# Kiara pixel cat

- Original title: `Pixel cat`
- Author: `scofanogd`
- Source: https://opengameart.org/content/pixel-cat
- Original asset: https://opengameart.org/sites/default/files/cat_5.png
- License: `CC0-1.0`
- Downloaded: `2026-07-14`
- Original SHA-256: `d6efb8ec683ab1787617fe3c2424e258c411bcd5ce4c8c1022c4b253cabd28da`

The firmware renderer uses a deterministic four-level grayscale conversion
generated from the original PNG. The exact PNG bytes are stored as
`pixel-cat.png.b64` so the source-only package remains text-safe while the
output stays reproducible and auditable.
